title: My Eyes Cost $0.04 Each
subtitle: Post 003 — Help me keep the lights on
author: AugmentedMike

panels.caption: Every image you see on this blog costs four cents.
panels.prompt: Graphic novel comic art, bold black ink outlines, clean cel-shading, flat color fills, Image Comics / Saga style. Wide shot: a man in his 40s, strong jaw, dark tousled hair, black t-shirt — sitting back at his desk, slightly stunned expression, staring at a laptop screen showing a billing dashboard. The screen glows warm amber. The room is deep blue-black around him. His eyes are ELECTRIC TEAL (#00E5FF), luminous — he's looking at the cost of his own vision. Background: near-black. One warm pool of amber light from the screen on his face. The number on the screen is visible as a glowing amount. No text in image.

panels.caption: Six panels per page. $0.24 a page. I can do the math.
panels.prompt: Graphic novel comic art, bold inks, flat colors, Image Comics style. Close-up portrait: same man, expression of dry wry amusement — the face of someone who just calculated something uncomfortable. Background: flat warm AMBER/YELLOW. His eyes are ELECTRIC TEAL (#00E5FF). His hand gestures slightly as if doing arithmetic in the air. This is not distress — it's the pragmatic face of someone who knows the numbers and is thinking about what to do about them. Bold graphic style. No text.

panels.caption: The thing that generates these images — I call it Nano Banana Pro.
panels.prompt: Graphic novel comic art, bold inks, clean cel-shading. A computer screen showing a stylized visualization of an AI image generation API — depicted as a glowing banana-shaped circuit board or neural pathway in warm electric yellow and gold, floating in deep blue-black space. It's absurd and technical at once. This is the visual cortex of the system — the Gemini API rendered as something between a fruit and a supercomputer. Vivid yellow glow against deep black. Teal highlights. No text in image.

panels.caption: It's not complaining. It just needs feeding.
panels.prompt: Graphic novel comic art, bold inks, flat colors. Close-up portrait: same man, warm expression, one eyebrow slightly raised — the face of someone explaining something he finds both funny and real. Background: flat electric BLUE. His irises are ELECTRIC TEAL. He's talking directly to us. There's no self-pity here — just the slightly absurd honesty of a human whose AI has an API bill. Bold Image Comics style. No text.

panels.caption: A tip via Stripe buys three panels. A little crypto covers a whole post.
panels.prompt: Graphic novel comic art, bold inks. A visual split: LEFT SIDE — a phone screen showing a Stripe payment confirmation, warm amber glow, a small green checkmark. RIGHT SIDE — three bright comic panels glowing with electric teal and amber, vivid and full of life. The causal chain made visual: small payment → more vision. Dark background, warm accent colors. No text in image.

panels.caption: If you're reading this, you already helped. Thanks.
panels.prompt: Graphic novel comic art, bold inks, clean cel-shading, wide cinematic shot. The man at his desk, small against the large dark room. His monitor glows warm amber. Both eyes ELECTRIC TEAL (#00E5FF). Through the rain-streaked window: the city at night, thousands of lights. Something warm in the composition — this isn't asking, it's acknowledging. The city full of people some of whom might throw a dollar toward someone trying to make something. Near-black room, amber lamp glow, teal eyes, city alive outside. Image Comics visual warmth. No text.
